name: Lemon Poppyseed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C).
2. Generously grease and flour the baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, blend all ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
